P0 問題：
  P0_canonical_circuit_breaker_active: canonical circuit breaker remains the current-live blocker (0/15 wins in recent 50)
    → clear the canonical circuit breaker by fixing recent-window release math or keep explicit no-deploy governance
  P0_recent_canonical_tail_pathology: recent canonical tail is still pathological (74 consecutive simulated_pyramid_win=0)
    → turn the pathological recent tail into a reproducible root cause and fix
  #H_AUTO_CIRCUIT_BREAKER: canonical circuit breaker active (0/15 wins in recent 50)
    → 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。
  #H_AUTO_STREAK: 連續 77 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
    → 檢查 recent canonical labels / regime breakdown / circuit breaker；必要時升級為 distribution-aware drift 調查

P1 問題：
  P1_scan_backed_best_needs_profile_promotion: scan_backed_best has restored comparable rows, but still needs graduation into a stable code-backed profile
    → convert the recovered comparable rows into a stable, productized canonical leaderboard profile set
  P1_execution_venue_readiness_unverified: venue readiness is still unverified even after breaker-first governance
    → prevent any false live-ready interpretation while venue lifecycle is still unverified
  #H_AUTO_MODEL_STABILITY: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6198, cv_std=0.0667, cv_worst=0.5557)
    → 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。
  #H_AUTO_REGIME_DRIFT: TW-IC 28 vs Global IC 14 — 信號強依賴近期資料
    → 市場 regime 可能已變化; 考慮 regime-gated feature weighting
  #H_AUTO_ALIGNMENT_GOVERNANCE: alignment governance still blocked (exact_supported_but_leaderboard_not_synced)
    → 同步 leaderboard / heartbeat summary / docs，讓 leaderboar
